nasb.text: Then Joseph had a dream, and when he told it to his brothers, they hated him even more.

esv.text: Now Joseph had a dream, and when he told it to his brothers they hated him even more.

cnv.text: 約瑟作了一個夢，把夢告訴哥哥們，他們就越發恨他。

ccb.text: 约瑟做了一个梦，并告诉了哥哥们，他们更恨他了。

csbs.text: 约瑟做了一个梦，告诉了他的哥哥们，他们就更加恨他。
